headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录285篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究190篇, 开源项目53篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（73篇）。其中12%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ iptv-org /iptv：Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

▸ chatwoot /chatwoot：Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesf

▸ NVIDIA /SkillSpector：Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks

▸ GorvGoyl /Clone-Wars：100+ open-source clones of popular sites like Airbnb, Amazon, Instagram, Netflix, Tiktok, Spotify, W

▸ Databricks Open-Sources Omnigent: A Meta-Harness That Composes, Governs, and Shares AI Agents Across Claude Code, Codex, and Pi：Databricks has open-sourced Omnigent, a meta-harness that sits above coding agents like Claude Code,
text: 今日共收录285篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究190篇, 开源项目53篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（73篇）。其中12%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
